class.name: Mage
class.description: Elemental power flows through all things… find it, study it, and harness it. A mage is bestowed their first strand of the Tapestry at birth; however, true mastery eludes those who idly rest upon this innate endowment. Instead, they diligently refine their natural gifts through scholarly pursuit, with tomes and parch- ments as their companions, alongside the sage counsel of a seasoned mentor or three! Yes, this is the chosen path of those who would wield authority over the elements. Comprehending the tapestry of mana is no trivial endeavor—it will yield its arcane secrets only to the earnest seeker of knowledge. Yet, once the adept learns to discern the subtleties of its intricate patterns as it unfurls and meanders into the ethereal expanse—it is in that moment the apprentice truly ascends to the mantle of mage. What makes a Mage: •Spellshaper. Customize the spells you cast: stretch time, gain extra-dimensional vision, or echo cast multiple spells! •Elemental Mastery. Harness the power of the elements, whether raining down fire from the heavens, freezing enemies in their tracks, or striking with thunderous bolts of lightning. •Chaos or Control. Will you snatch control of the frayed tapestry of mana or lean into the forces of chaos? What awaits you… Diamond Skin? Elemental Entanglement? Liquefy Legs?

progression.name: Elemental Spellcasting
progression.description: You know Fire, Ice, and Lightning cantrips.

progression.name: Mana and Unlock Tier 1 Spells
progression.description: You unlock tier 1 Fire, Ice, and Lightning spells and gain a mana pool to cast these spells. This mana pool’s maximum is always equal to (INT×3)+LVL and recharges on a Safe Rest.

progression.name: Talented Researcher
progression.description: Gain advantage on Arcana or Lore checks when you have access to a large amount of books and time to study them.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.description: Choose a Mage subclass.

progression.name: Elemental Mastery
progression.description: Learn the Utility Spells from 1 spell school you know.

progression.name: Study!
progression.description: Study! Whenever you study arcane books or are tutored by a higher level Mage during a Safe Rest, you may choose different Mage options available to you.

progression.name: Spellshaper
progression.description: You gain the ability to enhance your spells with powerful effects by spending additional mana. Choose 2 Spellshaper abilities.

progression.name: Tier 2 Spells
progression.description: You may now cast tier 2 spells and upcast spells at tier 2.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 INT or WIL.

progression.name: Elemental Surge
progression.description: A surge of adrenaline and your attunement with the elements grants you additional power as combat begins. When you roll Initiative, regain WIL mana (this expires at the end of combat if unused).

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 STR or DEX.

progression.name: Upgraded Cantrips
progression.description: Your cantrips grow stronger.

progression.name: Tier 3 Spells
progression.description: You may now cast tier 3 spells and upcast spells at tier 3.

progression.name: Elemental Mastery (2)
progression.description: Learn the Utility Spells from a 2nd spell school you know.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.description: Gain your Mage subclass feature.

progression.name: Tier 4 Spells
progression.description: You may now cast tier 4 spells and upcast spells at tier 4.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 INT or WIL.

progression.name: Spellshaper (2)
progression.description: Choose 1 additional Spellshaper ability.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 STR or DEX.

progression.name: Elemental Surge (2)
progression.description: Your Elemental Surge ability now regains WIL+1d4 mana.

progression.name: Tier 5 Spells
progression.description: You may now cast tier 5 spells and upcast spells at tier 5.

progression.name: Upgraded Cantrips
progression.description: Your cantrips grow stronger.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.description: Gain your Mage subclass feature.

progression.name: Tier 6 Spells
progression.description: You may now cast tier 6 spells and upcast spells at tier 6.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 INT or WIL.

progression.name: Spellshaper (3)
progression.description: Choose 1 additional Spellshaper ability.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 STR or DEX.

progression.name: Tier 7 Spells
progression.description: You may now cast tier 7 spells and upcast spells at tier 7.

progression.name: Elemental Mastery (3)
progression.description: Learn the Utility Spells from a 3rd spell school you know.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.description: Gain your Mage subclass feature.

progression.name: Upgraded Cantrips
progression.description: Your cantrips grow stronger.

progression.name: Tier 8 Spells
progression.description: You may now cast tier 8 spells and upcast spells at tier 8.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 INT or WIL.

progression.name: Elemental Surge (3)
progression.description: Your Elemental Surge ability now regains WIL+2d4 mana.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 STR or DEX.

progression.name: Tier 9 Spells
progression.description: You may now cast tier 9 spells and upcast spells at tier 9.

progression.name: Epic Boon
progression.description: Choose an Epic Boon (see pg. 23 of the GM's Guide).

progression.name: Archmage
progression.description: +1 to any 2 of your stats. The first tiered spell you cast each encounter costs 1 action less and 5 fewer mana.

progression.name: Upgraded Cantrips
progression.description: Your cantrips grow stronger.

progression.name: Force of Will
progression.description: (1/round) On your turn, you may Demand Control: Choose 1 option from the Control Table which you haven't chosen yet; resets when you roll Initiative, or when you have chosen all options once.

progression.name: Deny Fate
progression.description: Whenever you miss with a spell or an effect you cause is saved against, you MUST Demand Control.

progression.name: At Any Cost
progression.description: Learn 1 cantrip and 1 tiered spell from the Necrotic school.

progression.name: Nullify
progression.description: (1/encounter) Ignore all disadvantage and other negative effects on your next action this turn, then Demand Control.

progression.name: Steel Will
progression.description: (1/Safe Rest) Whenever you would fail a save, you may succeed instead. Whenever you roll a 1 on an Elemental Surge die, you may reroll it once.

progression.name: Supreme Control
progression.description: Whenever you Demand Control, you may choose to trigger the selected option twice. You may Demand Control as a Reaction.

progression.name: Force of Chaos
progression.description: Whenever you cast a spell, you can choose to spend 1 less mana. Whenever you do this and whenever you crit, Invoke Chaos: Roll on the Chaos Table.

progression.name: Where's the Chaos Table?
progression.description: Where's the Chaos Table? It's a secret for the GM only! Suffice it to say, rolling a 1 is really bad, but rolling a 20 is AWESOME—but if you’re sure you want to spoil it, you can find it on the back inside cover of the GM's Guide. Let chaos reign!

progression.name: Tempest Mage
progression.description: Learn 1 cantrip and 1 tiered spell from the Wind school.

progression.name: Chaos Lash
progression.description: (1/encounter) Reaction (when an enemy moves adjacent to you): They are pushed back 2 spaces, and on a failed WIL save, knocked Prone as well. Invoke Chaos.

progression.name: Thrive in Chaos
progression.description: Whenever you Invoke Chaos, you may roll twice and cause both effects. (1/ Safe Rest) You may choose which roll to use instead.

progression.name: Master of Chaos
progression.description: Whenever you Invoke Chaos, roll with advantage.

choiceOptions.name: Dimensional Compression
choiceOptions.description: (1 or more mana) +4 range to a spell for each additional mana spent.

choiceOptions.name: Echo Casting
choiceOptions.description: (2×mana, min. 1 mana) When you cast a tiered, single-target spell, you may cast a copy of that spell on a 2nd target for free.

choiceOptions.name: Elemental Destruction
choiceOptions.description: (1 or more mana) After you hit with a spell, you may spend 1 or more mana (up to your WIL) to reroll 1 die per mana spent.

choiceOptions.name: Elemental Transmutation
choiceOptions.description: (1 mana) Change the damage type of a spell to: Fire, Ice, Lightning, Necrotic, or Radiant.

choiceOptions.name: Extra-Dimensional Vision
choiceOptions.description: (2 mana) You may ignore the line of sight requirement of a spell. Your spell will phase though barriers and obstacles to reach a target you know of within range.

choiceOptions.name: Methodical Spellweaver
choiceOptions.description: (–2 mana) Spend 1 additional action to reduce the mana cost of a spell by 2 (min 1).

choiceOptions.name: Precise Casting
choiceOptions.description: (1+ mana) Choose 1 creature per mana spent to be unaffected by a spell you cast.

choiceOptions.name: Stretch Time
choiceOptions.description: (2 mana) Reduce the action cost of a spell by 1 (min 1).

choiceOptions.name: Magic is Dangerous
choiceOptions.description: You can stitch its fraying edges together to your own benefit… for a time.

choiceOptions.name: I INSIST
choiceOptions.description: Cast a cantrip for free, ignoring all disadvantage; it cannot miss.

choiceOptions.name: ELEMENTAL AFFLICTION
choiceOptions.description: A creature of your choice within 12 spaces gains the Charged, Smoldering, or Slowed condition.

choiceOptions.name: NO
choiceOptions.description: Choose a creature; it cannot harm a creature of your choice during its next turn.

choiceOptions.name: LOSE CONTROL
choiceOptions.description: Do ALL of the above, but the GM chooses each time.

choiceOptions.name: Force of Will
